description: Delay setBrowserView in reCreateBrowserView until did-finish-load. While the BrowserView is not attached, the renderer sees visibilityState:hidden, so the auth module can initialize (LOAD_TOKEN -> me -> CDP fake me -> Redux populated) before visibilitychange:visible fires. When did-finish-load fires and the BrowserView is shown, async Vr finds a user in Redux and does not log out.
